text:
Self-Help Memo for Explorers
and Explorer Candidates
translation:
Self-Help Memo for Explorers
and Explorer Candidates

text:
If you're experiencing physical or mental discomfort:
1. Inhale and exhale slowly.
2. Move around: do some squats, stretch forward, jump in place, and swing your arms.
3. Say out loud: 5 objects you can see / 5 sounds you can hear / your Explorer ID and Facility number.
4. Take a shower.
5. Get a good night's sleep.
6. Request support from your fellow Explorer during the next expedition.
translation:
If you're experiencing physical or mental discomfort:
1. Inhale and exhale slowly.
2. Move around: do some squats, stretch forward, jump in place, and swing your arms.
3. Say out loud: 5 objects you can see / 5 sounds you can hear / your Explorer ID and Facility number.
4. Take a shower.
5. Get a good night's sleep.
6. Request support from your fellow Explorer during the next expedition.

text:
Every Altered individual has a companion that appears in the form of someone from the host's past chosen for maximum emotional impact.
Though it resembles a hallucination, it is not psychological in origin and is unaffected by medication.
Companions are visible only to their hosts within the PA.
They motivate their hosts and guide them toward the PA's center.

text:
I refuse to work for the Committee.

I'm not going back to their Facility.

I will stay in the Radius.

I will get everything I need on my own.
translation:
I refuse to work for the Committee.

I'm not going back to their Facility.

I will stay in the Radius.

I will get everything I need on my own.

text:
The Radius is almighty. It created this world and every one of us. The Radius sees everything. Its Presence watches over us. The Radius has a design. It gave us purpose and waits for us to fulfill it. The Radius tests us. It places obstacles in our way and gives us everything we need to overcome them.
I feel its Presence. And I'm walking towards its center.
translation:
The Radius is almighty. It created this world and every one of us. The Radius sees everything. Its Presence watches over us. The Radius has a design. It gave us purpose and waits for us to fulfill it. The Radius tests us. It places obstacles in our way and gives us everything we need to overcome them.
I feel its Presence. And I'm walking towards its center.

text:
The Committee knows about our Guides and sees them as a threat. They lie to us about them. Your Guide is not a figment of your imagination, not a symptom of amnesia, and not a side-effect of rebirth. Value them. Listen to them. And don't ever get rid of them! I destroyed my Guide. I lost an important part of myself. Now I'll never make it to the center of the Radius...
Aleksei
translation:
The Committee knows about our Guides and sees them as a threat. They lie to us about them. Your Guide is not a figment of your imagination, not a symptom of amnesia, and not a side-effect of rebirth. Value them. Listen to them. And don't ever get rid of them! I destroyed my Guide. I lost an important part of myself. Now I'll never make it to the center of the Radius...
Aleksei

text:
If you're reading this, it means I've already left for my final mission.
We've been through a lot together. Completed countless tasks. Always had each other's backs.
We made a great team, but... I'm sorry, I have to take this trip alone, my friend. I'm sure you'll understand.
Explorer 45
translation:
If you're reading this, it means I've already left for my final mission.
We've been through a lot together. Completed countless tasks. Always had each other's backs.
We made a great team, but... I'm sorry, I have to take this trip alone, my friend. I'm sure you'll understand.
Explorer 45

text:
There is a legend about a friendly Spawn or Creep that never attacks.
Explorers call it Pecho.
So far, no one has managed to tame it, but some say you can still encounter it.
Some Explorers make toy Pechos and leave them in the Radius for others to find.
They say that if you carry one of these toys, enemies will have a harder time hitting you.
translation:
There is a legend about a friendly Spawn or Creep that never attacks.
Explorers call it Pecho.
So far, no one has managed to tame it, but some say you can still encounter it.
Some Explorers make toy Pechos and leave them in the Radius for others to find.
They say that if you carry one of these toys, enemies will have a harder time hitting you.

text:
They say that every now and then, you can encounter an Explorer Mimic in the Radius.
It only appears at night, wears armor and a helmet, fires various altered guns, and can restore its health using altered syringes.
It will hunt down an Explorer until either it kills them or is killed.
Once destroyed, it won't reappear until the next Tide.
translation:
They say that every now and then, you can encounter an Explorer Mimic in the Radius.
It only appears at night, wears armor and a helmet, fires various altered guns, and can restore its health using altered syringes.
It will hunt down an Explorer until either it kills them or is killed.
Once destroyed, it won't reappear until the next Tide.

text: My grandma was born on one of these islands. She used to tell me stories about the local fishermen. Some more believable than others. The one I still remember was about my great-grandfather and his friends deciding to smuggle alcohol across the Finnish border. Almost got caught by border patrol on their very first try, so they quickly gave up that idea and went back to fishing. I wish I could've spent more time with her... I bet she had a lot more to tell.
translation: My grandma was born on one of these islands. She used to tell me stories about the local fishermen. Some more believable than others. The one I still remember was about my great-grandfather and his friends deciding to smuggle alcohol across the Finnish border. Almost got caught by border patrol on their very first try, so they quickly gave up that idea and went back to fishing. I wish I could've spent more time with her... I bet she had a lot more to tell.

text: I still remember my first time fishing with grandpa. We dug up a bunch of worms the night before and put them into a jar, but I forgot to close it. By morning, half of them were crawling all over the bedroom. Grandpa made me a fishing rod out of a stick and a piece of string. We waited for hours only to catch two tiny Smelts right before heading home. From then on, grandma'd always chuckle at us each time we went fishing...
translation: I still remember my first time fishing with grandpa. We dug up a bunch of worms the night before and put them into a jar, but I forgot to close it. By morning, half of them were crawling all over the bedroom. Grandpa made me a fishing rod out of a stick and a piece of string. We waited for hours only to catch two tiny Smelts right before heading home. From then on, grandma'd always chuckle at us each time we went fishing...

text: I wonder which of these houses belonged to your grandparents... They sent you here each summer and you'd always refuse to go without me. I think your mom was just pretending to be annoyed, but she didn't really mind. Remember how we'd ride our bikes and steal apples from uncle Nikita's garden? We played skirmish, hunted for treasures... and this is where I met Yul'ka...
translation: I wonder which of these houses belonged to your grandparents... They sent you here each summer and you'd always refuse to go without me. I think your mom was just pretending to be annoyed, but she didn't really mind. Remember how we'd ride our bikes and steal apples from uncle Nikita's garden? We played skirmish, hunted for treasures... and this is where I met Yul'ka...

text: I loved going here as a kid. It was a rare treat! On some weekends, uncle Misha and aunt Lena would pick us up in their red "Moskvich" and take us here. Mom would always buy me ice-cream so I wouldn't whine or act up. We'd carry large bags home and stuff our faces like it was a New Year's feast. Didn't take much to make us happy back then, did it?
translation: I loved going here as a kid. It was a rare treat! On some weekends, uncle Misha and aunt Lena would pick us up in their red "Moskvich" and take us here. Mom would always buy me ice-cream so I wouldn't whine or act up. We'd carry large bags home and stuff our faces like it was a New Year's feast. Didn't take much to make us happy back then, did it?

text: Haha! Remember this stage? Our homeroom teacher once made us join the school choir 'as a corrective measure'. We had to sing with them at the May Day celebration. Of course we didn't learn any lyrics! Just stood in front of the audience making faces and pretending to sing... And then, the whole front row started pointing at us. I guess our music career ended back then, before it even started!
translation: Haha! Remember this stage? Our homeroom teacher once made us join the school choir 'as a corrective measure'. We had to sing with them at the May Day celebration. Of course we didn't learn any lyrics! Just stood in front of the audience making faces and pretending to sing... And then, the whole front row started pointing at us. I guess our music career ended back then, before it even started!

text: I never liked our school. It was okay for messing around, but classes were absolute torture. You somehow managed to keep your grades high, but I never could. And honestly, I didn't even try. What I was good at, was getting us both into trouble! And here we are again. Trying to get ourselves out of another mess...
translation: I never liked our school. It was okay for messing around, but classes were absolute torture. You somehow managed to keep your grades high, but I never could. And honestly, I didn't even try. What I was good at, was getting us both into trouble! And here we are again. Trying to get ourselves out of another mess...

text:
A special device designed to activate the process of alteration a living organism.
To be fitted with Artifact Container and Supercapacitor before launch.

A special device designed to activate the process of alteration a living organism.
To be fitted with Artifact Container and Supercapacitor before launch.

text:
• Insert the charged Supercapacitor and the Artifact Container with unstable Artifact into the designated slots.
• Place the Alteration Unit on the marked spot.
• Press the button on the unit to start the alteration process.
• Should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.
translation:
• Insert the charged Supercapacitor and the Artifact Container with unstable Artifact into the designated slots.
• Place the Alteration Unit on the marked spot.
• Press the button on the unit to start the alteration process.
• Should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.

text: A portable device that amplifies the signal in the Committee's Sensor Network, enhancing the accuracy of monitoring in harsh conditions. It aids in detecting unstable entities within the Pechorsk Anomaly.
translation: A portable device that amplifies the signal in the Committee's Sensor Network, enhancing the accuracy of monitoring in harsh conditions. It aids in detecting unstable entities within the Pechorsk Anomaly.

text: • Place on the marked spot to connect it to the UNPSC Sensor Network.
translation: • Place on the marked spot to connect it to the UNPSC Sensor Network.

text: A device designed to contain unstable Artifacts. Holds one unit. Updated version not subject to the altering effects of its contents.
translation: A device designed to contain unstable Artifacts. Holds one unit. Updated version not subject to the altering effects of its contents.

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to open or close. • Use an Advanced Artifact Detector to locate and reveal unstable Artifact from an Invisible Nest. • Quickly place the Artifact inside the Container to lock it in place.
translation: • Press {BTN_Trigger} to open or close. • Use an Advanced Artifact Detector to locate and reveal unstable Artifact from an Invisible Nest. • Quickly place the Artifact inside the Container to lock it in place.

text: A test sample of a device designed to contain unstable Artifacts. Holds one unit. Can be subject to the altering effects of its contents, but retains them within.

text: A device that ensures UNPSC's energy independence. It is a supercapacitor that is charged from the Electrostatic Anomaly. Charging process poses a risk of physical harm to the user.

text: • Press {BTN_Trigger} on your free hand and pull the top to expand. • Move quickly through the Electrostatic Anomaly to cause a discharge and charge it.
translation: • Press {BTN_Trigger} on your free hand and pull the top to expand. • Move quickly through the Electrostatic Anomaly to cause a discharge and charge it.

text: A special device designed to activate the Door Artifact and trigger the Door Anomaly. The destination of this anomaly is currently under study and requires field testing.

text: You've dropped required item. Locate it using the Map.
translation: You've dropped required item. Locate it using the Map.

text: You've lost the Distortion-Proof Headgear you can't enter the zone without, go pick it up.
translation: You've lost the Distortion-Proof Headgear you can't enter the zone without, go pick it up.

text: Your item is in wrong state.
translation: Your item is in wrong state.

text: You've lost items required to complete the mission. Locate them using the Map.
translation: You've lost items required to complete the mission. Locate them using the Map.

text: You've lost the Artifact. Locate it using the Map.
translation: You've lost the Artifact. Locate it using the Map.

text: You've lost the Artifact Container. Locate it using the Map.
translation: You've lost the Artifact Container. Locate it using the Map.

text: You've lost the Supercapacitor. Locate it using the Map.
translation: You've lost the Supercapacitor. Locate it using the Map.

text: You've lost the Door Artifact Activator. Locate it using the Map.
translation: You've lost the Door Artifact Activator. Locate it using the Map.

text: Bring your watch to the door lock to access Training Ground.
translation: Bring your watch to the door lock to access Training Ground.

text: You can turn off the sound if it disturbs you. Try doing so now.
translation: You can turn off the sound if it disturbs you. Try doing so now.

text:
Grab the Chest Rig, bring it to your chest
and release to put it on.
translation:
Grab the Chest Rig, bring it to your chest
and release to put it on.

text:
Place the Explorer Tablet
into the slot on the Rig.
translation:
Place the Explorer Tablet
into the slot on the Rig.

text: To crawl under an obstacle, use {BTN_Crouch} or crouch physically.
translation: To crawl under an obstacle, use {BTN_Crouch} or crouch physically.

text: To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip. Grab the Probes from the distance.
translation: To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip. Grab the Probes from the distance.

text: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to prepare a Probe. Swing and release Trigger to throw.
translation: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to prepare a Probe. Swing and release Trigger to throw.

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Grip to take off the Rig. Hold the Rig in your hand or place it on the dummy to be able to attach the Sidearm Holster or shift other pouches on it.
translation: Hold {BTN_Bottom} and press Grip to take off the Rig. Hold the Rig in your hand or place it on the dummy to be able to attach the Sidearm Holster or shift other pouches on it.

text:
Grab the Sidearm Holster
and bring it to an empty area on the Rig.
Release to place it.
translation:
Grab the Sidearm Holster
and bring it to an empty area on the Rig.
Release to place it.

text: You can remove a pouch from the Rig by holding {BTN_Bottom} and pressing {BTN_Grip}.
translation: You can remove a pouch from the Rig by holding {BTN_Bottom} and pressing {BTN_Grip}.

text: You can place pouches at any angle. Hold {BTN_Trigger} to adjust the angle and release the pouch to place it on the Rig.
translation: You can place pouches at any angle. Hold {BTN_Trigger} to adjust the angle and release the pouch to place it on the Rig.

text:
Once you're done,
bring the Rig to your chest
and release to put it on.
translation:
Once you're done,
bring the Rig to your chest
and release to put it on.

text: Insert the magazine into the pistol.
translation: Insert the magazine into the pistol.

text: Use Trigger with your other hand and pull to rack the slide back and cock the pistol.
translation: Use Trigger with your other hand and pull to rack the slide back and cock the pistol.

text: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.
translation: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} to eject the magazine or press to drop it.
translation: Hold {BTN_Bottom} to eject the magazine or press to drop it.

text: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to open the box, and one cartridge will pop out.
translation: Hold {BTN_Trigger} to open the box, and one cartridge will pop out.

text:
Bring the cartridge to the magazine
to begin loading it.
Load the full magazine.
translation:
Bring the cartridge to the magazine
to begin loading it.
Load the full magazine.

text: Insert the magazine into the pistol.
translation: Insert the magazine into the pistol.

text: To close the slide, pull it with the Trigger in your other hand or press {BTN_Top} on the hand holding the gun.
translation: To close the slide, pull it with the Trigger in your other hand or press {BTN_Top} on the hand holding the gun.

text: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.
translation: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.

text: Place the pistol into the holster on your Rig.
translation: Place the pistol into the holster on your Rig.

text: Grab the Backpack and move it over non-dominant shoulder and release to move it to your back.
translation: Grab the Backpack and move it over non-dominant shoulder and release to move it to your back.

text: Bring your hand over the shoulder and press Grip to take out the Backpack. Release it in front of you. It will automatically snap to your back once you step away.
translation: Bring your hand over the shoulder and press Grip to take out the Backpack. Release it in front of you. It will automatically snap to your back once you step away.

text: You can hang your Backpack on a rack.
translation: You can hang your Backpack on a rack.

text: When you hang your backpack on a rack, you unequip it – it'll stop snapping to your back. You can also unequip it by holding {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} over the shoulder when you are wearing the backpack.
translation: When you hang your backpack on a rack, you unequip it – it'll stop snapping to your back. You can also unequip it by holding {BTN_Bottom} + {BTN_Grip} over the shoulder when you are wearing the backpack.

text: Helmet, rig or vest, and backpack you're wearing, and the weapon in your hands take up your own capacity. The heavier they are, the slower you get.
translation: Helmet, rig or vest, and backpack you're wearing, and the weapon in your hands take up your own capacity. The heavier they are, the slower you get.

text: Hold {BTN_Top} with your empty hand to open Player Info to check your current loadout and how it affects you.
translation: Hold {BTN_Top} with your empty hand to open Player Info to check your current loadout and how it affects you.

text: To check an item's loadout and other parameters, grab the item and hold {BTN_ItemInfo}.
translation: To check an item's loadout and other parameters, grab the item and hold {BTN_ItemInfo}.

text: You've just heard the signal that the Mission Objective has been completed.
translation: You've just heard the signal that the Mission Objective has been completed.

text: You can check your new Mission Objective in the Tablet.
translation: You can check your new Mission Objective in the Tablet.

text: Pass the test to continue the mission.
translation: Pass the test to continue the mission.

text: To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip.
translation: To pick up an object from a distance or from the floor – select it by holding {BTN_Trigger} and press Grip.

text:
Place the Flashlight
into the slot on the Rig.
translation:
Place the Flashlight
into the slot on the Rig.

text: Use {BTN_Trigger} to switch on/off the Flashlight.
translation: Use {BTN_Trigger} to switch on/off the Flashlight.

text:
To assemble the gun,
first put its frame into the vise.
translation:
To assemble the gun,
first put its frame into the vise.

text:
Grab the pistol grip
and bring it close to the frame in the vise
to install.
translation:
Grab the pistol grip
and bring it close to the frame in the vise
to install.

text:
For this shotgun,
the handguard can only be installed
onto the barrel.
translation:
For this shotgun,
the handguard can only be installed
onto the barrel.

text: Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove a part from the gun in the vise.
translation: Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove a part from the gun in the vise.

text: You can attach or remove attachments without a vise. Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove an attachment.
translation: You can attach or remove attachments without a vise. Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Grip to remove an attachment.

text: To turn on/off an attachment mounted on a weapon, Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Trigger.
translation: To turn on/off an attachment mounted on a weapon, Hold {BTN_Bottom} + Trigger.

text: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.
translation: You can view item details in Item Info. To do so, hold {BTN_ItemInfo} on the hand holding the item.

text:
All weapons have durability and require cleaning.
Put the PM into the vise.
translation:
All weapons have durability and require cleaning.
Put the PM into the vise.

text: Lower durability means worse weapon parameters and higher chance of malfunction.
translation: Lower durability means worse weapon parameters and higher chance of malfunction.

text: To restore durability, spray oil on the weapon and then scrub it with a brush to remove dirt.
translation: To restore durability, spray oil on the weapon and then scrub it with a brush to remove dirt.

text: Some weapons consist of different parts, each with its own durability. These parts gather dirt at different rates and affect the weapon in different ways.
translation: Some weapons consist of different parts, each with its own durability. These parts gather dirt at different rates and affect the weapon in different ways.

text: You can check the durability of a weapon or weapon part in Item Info.
translation: You can check the durability of a weapon or weapon part in Item Info.

text: Keep an eye on your weapon and maintain it regularly.
translation: Keep an eye on your weapon and maintain it regularly.

text: Results of the Pechorsk Anomaly's attempts to recreate the material world of Pechorsk. These are altered copies of real objects absorbed by the Anomaly at the moment of its manifestation in 1987. Typically appear as small household items with unstable surface. They have no obvious active anomalous properties and are generally unsuitable for normal use. Any potential hidden properties are subject to study by the Committee.
translation: Results of the Pechorsk Anomaly's attempts to recreate the material world of Pechorsk. These are altered copies of real objects absorbed by the Anomaly at the moment of its manifestation in 1987. Typically appear as small household items with unstable surface. They have no obvious active anomalous properties and are generally unsuitable for normal use. Any potential hidden properties are subject to study by the Committee.

text: You! Reach the center of the Radius. They are expecting you, outside and within. It is time. Begin your journey into the Radius.
translation: You! Reach the center of the Radius. They are expecting you, outside and within. It is time. Begin your journey into the Radius.

text: Warning! Stop! You are approaching the perimeter of the Pechorsk Security Zone. This area is supervised by the UNPSC.
translation: Warning! Stop! You are approaching the perimeter of the Pechorsk Security Zone. This area is supervised by the UNPSC.

text: If you understand this, proceed to the marked area and raise your hands!
translation: If you understand this, proceed to the marked area and raise your hands!

text: Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.
translation: Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.

text: Upon exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, you may experience physical discomfort or memory loss. These conditions are temporary. Here at the UNPSC Facility, you are safe and under constant supervision. Please proceed to the Command Room for further instructions.
translation: Upon exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, you may experience physical discomfort or memory loss. These conditions are temporary. Here at the UNPSC Facility, you are safe and under constant supervision. Please proceed to the Command Room for further instructions.

text: This is the Command Room. The Terminal here provides a direct link to UNPSC Headquarters.
translation: This is the Command Room. The Terminal here provides a direct link to UNPSC Headquarters.

text: Welcome to the United Nations Pechorsk Special Committee!
translation: Welcome to the United Nations Pechorsk Special Committee!

text: We regret to inform you that your former hometown of Pechorsk no longer exists. It was lost in 1987, consumed by the emergence of the Pechorsk Anomaly, also known as the Radius.
translation: We regret to inform you that your former hometown of Pechorsk no longer exists. It was lost in 1987, consumed by the emergence of the Pechorsk Anomaly, also known as the Radius.

text: You are now in the Pechorsk Security Zone, at the UNPSC Explorers Facility 27.
translation: You are now in the Pechorsk Security Zone, at the UNPSC Explorers Facility 27.

text: You have also been exposed to the Radius and are now considered Altered: you don't get sick, don't age, and you come back to life in case of dying.
translation: You have also been exposed to the Radius and are now considered Altered: you don't get sick, don't age, and you come back to life in case of dying.

text: You are also capable of entering and exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, but travelling far from it will result in permanent death.
translation: You are also capable of entering and exiting the Pechorsk Anomaly, but travelling far from it will result in permanent death.

text: Your past life is over. Your future now depends on our collaborative efforts. You are invited to make a personal contribution to our research of the Pechorsk Anomaly as a UNPSC Field Explorer.
translation: Your past life is over. Your future now depends on our collaborative efforts. You are invited to make a personal contribution to our research of the Pechorsk Anomaly as a UNPSC Field Explorer.

text: To confirm your ability to enter and exit the Radius under any circumstances, you must undergo a verification procedure. All you need to do is enter the Pechorsk Anomaly and activate the designated verification device.
translation: To confirm your ability to enter and exit the Radius under any circumstances, you must undergo a verification procedure. All you need to do is enter the Pechorsk Anomaly and activate the designated verification device.

text: Please put on the coded wristband, leave the Facility, and enter the provided code into the Terminal Evacuation Device awaiting you at the nearest segment of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Keep in mind that the Radius is full of hazards. It is devoid of any sentient beings and almost all anomalous phenomena are lethal. Do not deviate from your objective, and exercise extreme caution.
translation: Please put on the coded wristband, leave the Facility, and enter the provided code into the Terminal Evacuation Device awaiting you at the nearest segment of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Keep in mind that the Radius is full of hazards. It is devoid of any sentient beings and almost all anomalous phenomena are lethal. Do not deviate from your objective, and exercise extreme caution.

text: Glad to see you again. I know a lot of this might look familiar, but trust me, it isn't.
translation: Glad to see you again. I know a lot of this might look familiar, but trust me, it isn't.

text: And we're not the same anymore. You are Altered. I'm your Guide. You still look human, but I'm...
translation: And we're not the same anymore. You are Altered. I'm your Guide. You still look human, but I'm...

text: On the bright side, I have places like this. You can use them to move around in the Radius. Outside of them it's deadly. And you won't find food or water. So for now, play nice with the Committee, or they'll lock you out of the Facility.
translation: On the bright side, I have places like this. You can use them to move around in the Radius. Outside of them it's deadly. And you won't find food or water. So for now, play nice with the Committee, or they'll lock you out of the Facility.

text: See this rope going into the fog? That's where you're going.
translation: See this rope going into the fog? That's where you're going.

text: Attention! Stop! You are... Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.
translation: Attention! Stop! You are... Access to the UNPSC Explorers Facility is granted.

text:
UNPSC server data successfully
downloaded to Terminal.
translation:
UNPSC server data successfully
downloaded to Terminal.

text: Supervisor's attention is required to proceed.
translation: Supervisor's attention is required to proceed.

text: Please remain where you are and wait for an authorized UNPSC employee to connect with you.
translation: Please remain where you are and wait for an authorized UNPSC employee to connect with you.

text: Can I start now? Alright then... Hello! My name is Eva. I'm the Junior Explorer Relations Specialist for The Committee, and your supervisor. I hope you can hear and understand me... Nod and wave your hand if you can – we can see you.
translation: Can I start now? Alright then... Hello! My name is Eva. I'm the Junior Explorer Relations Specialist for The Committee, and your supervisor. I hope you can hear and understand me... Nod and wave your hand if you can – we can see you.

text: Right, so... On behalf of the Committee, we apologize for the verification procedure you were subjected to. We needed to confirm that you possess the key abilities of an altered human and can use them in Explorer's work. We hope, that...
translation: Right, so... On behalf of the Committee, we apologize for the verification procedure you were subjected to. We needed to confirm that you possess the key abilities of an altered human and can use them in Explorer's work. We hope, that...

text: Listen, I'm sorry. I can't even imagine what it's like – to just suddenly find out you're in the future, and everything you had... is all in the past... And then get blown up for some test. Anyway, you've passed the evaluation. And that shouldn't happen again.
translation: Listen, I'm sorry. I can't even imagine what it's like – to just suddenly find out you're in the future, and everything you had... is all in the past... And then get blown up for some test. Anyway, you've passed the evaluation. And that shouldn't happen again.

text: Now it's time to officially make you an Explorer... I-I click here, right?
translation: Now it's time to officially make you an Explorer... I-I click here, right?

text: That's your new uniform. Go ahead, get changed, I'm... we're not looking.
translation: That's your new uniform. Go ahead, get changed, I'm... we're not looking.

text: Seems a bit loose, but it'll do. Right. Watch activated, readings are nominal.
translation: Seems a bit loose, but it'll do. Right. Watch activated, readings are nominal.

text: Sorry about this, but we can't just trust you and hand everything over at once. You'll need to prove yourself by completing tasks. Your Security Level will rise accordingly, and your permissions will expand. Simply do your job, and you'll be fine. But first, you'll need to pass sort of a Boot Camp. Accept your first mission – and let's do this! Good luck, Explorer!
translation: Sorry about this, but we can't just trust you and hand everything over at once. You'll need to prove yourself by completing tasks. Your Security Level will rise accordingly, and your permissions will expand. Simply do your job, and you'll be fine. But first, you'll need to pass sort of a Boot Camp. Accept your first mission – and let's do this! Good luck, Explorer!

text: Complete the Basic Training and receive Explorer Starter Kit.
translation: Complete the Basic Training and receive Explorer Starter Kit.

text: Enter the Training Ground and follow the instructions.
translation: Enter the Training Ground and follow the instructions.

text: Locate and collect the training item during the test.
translation: Locate and collect the training item during the test.

text: Complete the test by achieving the required score.
translation: Complete the test by achieving the required score.

text: Deliver the training item to the Terminal
translation: Deliver the training item to the Terminal

text: Deliver the training item to the Terminal in the Command Room.
translation: Deliver the training item to the Terminal in the Command Room.

text: To access the Facility premises, use the Explorer's Watch. If you do not have an activated Explorer's Watch, please return to the Command Room and follow your supervisor's instructions.
translation: To access the Facility premises, use the Explorer's Watch. If you do not have an activated Explorer's Watch, please return to the Command Room and follow your supervisor's instructions.

text: Welcome to the Basic Explorer Training Course! Here, you will be issued and trained to use the standard UNPSC Explorer gear. You will undergo a brief test to evaluate the provided equipment and applied knowledge. Please follow all instructions and take sensible precautions!
translation: Welcome to the Basic Explorer Training Course! Here, you will be issued and trained to use the standard UNPSC Explorer gear. You will undergo a brief test to evaluate the provided equipment and applied knowledge. Please follow all instructions and take sensible precautions!

text: To make carrying weapons and equipment more convenient, you can place Pouches and Holsters on the Chest Rig as you wish. To arrange and reposition Pouches on the Rig, you must hold it in your hand or hang it on a dummy. Grab the Sidearm Holster and place it on the Chest Rig wherever you want.
translation: To make carrying weapons and equipment more convenient, you can place Pouches and Holsters on the Chest Rig as you wish. To arrange and reposition Pouches on the Rig, you must hold it in your hand or hang it on a dummy. Grab the Sidearm Holster and place it on the Chest Rig wherever you want.

text: For confronting the hostile entities of the Pechorsk Anomaly the Explorers are issued firearms. Proficiency in their handling is critical for your survival. Take the provided gun and insert the magazine. Release the safety and rack the slide to make it ready to fire.
translation: For confronting the hostile entities of the Pechorsk Anomaly the Explorers are issued firearms. Proficiency in their handling is critical for your survival. Take the provided gun and insert the magazine. Release the safety and rack the slide to make it ready to fire.

text: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.
translation: Shoot at targets until the magazine is empty.

text: Not too bad. I hope this will help you out in the Radius. I mean, you won't die permanently there, but it might be unpleasant either way.
translation: Not too bad. I hope this will help you out in the Radius. I mean, you won't die permanently there, but it might be unpleasant either way.

text: Reload the gun with the provided ammunition.
translation: Reload the gun with the provided ammunition.

text: Know your weapon. Monitor its condition and keep track of your ammunition.
translation: Know your weapon. Monitor its condition and keep track of your ammunition.

text: For carrying gear that doesn't need to be at hand all the time, as well as collected items, Explorers are issued special backpacks. Backpacks have limited capacity and can be outfitted with extra holsters and pouches. Remember that every item you wear or carry affects your capacity. These include your helmet, rig, vest, backpack, and weapon. The heavier they are, the slower you move. For your convenience, the Facility provides various storage solutions for weapons and equipment.
translation: For carrying gear that doesn't need to be at hand all the time, as well as collected items, Explorers are issued special backpacks. Backpacks have limited capacity and can be outfitted with extra holsters and pouches. Remember that every item you wear or carry affects your capacity. These include your helmet, rig, vest, backpack, and weapon. The heavier they are, the slower you move. For your convenience, the Facility provides various storage solutions for weapons and equipment.

text: This is the Explorer's Tablet. It contains a Map, a list of accepted Missions, built-in lighting, and the Explorer's Handbook with useful information. Have a look and take it with you.
translation: This is the Explorer's Tablet. It contains a Map, a list of accepted Missions, built-in lighting, and the Explorer's Handbook with useful information. Have a look and take it with you.

text: You will now demonstrate the knowledge and skills you've acquired in a controlled, safe environment. Neutralize all targets and collect the required equipment to pass the test. Missing your shots or getting hit by the anomaly mock-ups will reduce your final score.
translation: You will now demonstrate the knowledge and skills you've acquired in a controlled, safe environment. Neutralize all targets and collect the required equipment to pass the test. Missing your shots or getting hit by the anomaly mock-ups will reduce your final score.

text:
Please demonstrate your skills in shooting enemies, avoiding anomalies, and securing specified items.
Passing this test is required for Security Level 1 clearance.
translation:
Please demonstrate your skills in shooting enemies, avoiding anomalies, and securing specified items.
Passing this test is required for Security Level 1 clearance.

text:
Locate and collect
the specified items
translation:
Locate and collect
the specified items

text: To finish the test, complete the primary objective.
translation: To finish the test, complete the primary objective.

text:
Hit all targets
with minimum misses
translation:
Hit all targets
with minimum misses

text:
Navigate the area
discharging the Anomalies
translation:
Navigate the area
discharging the Anomalies

text:
You have successfully passed the UNPSC Explorer Basic Training Test.

Please proceed to the next room to complete the course.
translation:
You have successfully passed the UNPSC Explorer Basic Training Test.

Please proceed to the next room to complete the course.

text: Alright, are you ready? Let's see what you're capable of.
translation: Alright, are you ready? Let's see what you're capable of.

text: Test complete! Congratulations on successfully completing the Basic Explorer Training Course! Finalize your Explorer Starter Kit by attaching the issued Dump Pouch to your Chest Rig and collecting the provided consumables. The pouch can be used for empty magazines and miscellaneous items.
translation: Test complete! Congratulations on successfully completing the Basic Explorer Training Course! Finalize your Explorer Starter Kit by attaching the issued Dump Pouch to your Chest Rig and collecting the provided consumables. The pouch can be used for empty magazines and miscellaneous items.

text: Well... You did good! All this should keep you alive in the Pechorsk Anomaly. Now, head back to the Command Room and complete your current mission! There's a promotion waiting.
translation: Well... You did good! All this should keep you alive in the Pechorsk Anomaly. Now, head back to the Command Room and complete your current mission! There's a promotion waiting.

text: Explorers use chest rigs and vests to carry weapons and gear. Wear this chest rig and put the tablet in the designated slot.
translation: Explorers use chest rigs and vests to carry weapons and gear. Wear this chest rig and put the tablet in the designated slot.

text: The Pocket Flashlight is an essential piece of the Explorer's gear. You can hold it in your hand or attach to your chest or any other equipment slot. Take the Flashlight and place it into your chest slot.
translation: The Pocket Flashlight is an essential piece of the Explorer's gear. You can hold it in your hand or attach to your chest or any other equipment slot. Take the Flashlight and place it into your chest slot.

text: Right... we seem to have a technical issue on our end. The belt's dead. Can you try and reach the flashlight on your own? You won't be able to proceed without it.
translation: Right... we seem to have a technical issue on our end. The belt's dead. Can you try and reach the flashlight on your own? You won't be able to proceed without it.

text: Use the flashlight to get through this section.
translation: Use the flashlight to get through this section.

text: The Radius is full of hazards. The most common type is anomalies. They vary in form and behavior. Most of them can be detected or discharged by throwing special Probes. Take the Probe Feeder and discharge the interactive anomaly mock-up. This will unlock the exit.
translation: The Radius is full of hazards. The most common type is anomalies. They vary in form and behavior. Most of them can be detected or discharged by throwing special Probes. Take the Probe Feeder and discharge the interactive anomaly mock-up. This will unlock the exit.

text: Well, let's hope you're ready. As an Explorer, your role is to venture into the Pechorsk Anomaly, collect artifacts, complete missions, and discover various objects of interest. It may sound mundane, but trust me, all of this serves our ultimate goal. You aren't just collecting random samples. This matters for all of humanity! But we'll talk more about that later. Now, you have been granted your first Security Level. Congratulations!
translation: Well, let's hope you're ready. As an Explorer, your role is to venture into the Pechorsk Anomaly, collect artifacts, complete missions, and discover various objects of interest. It may sound mundane, but trust me, all of this serves our ultimate goal. You aren't just collecting random samples. This matters for all of humanity! But we'll talk more about that later. Now, you have been granted your first Security Level. Congratulations!

text: With this promotion, you have access to most of the Facility. Now you have a place to stay and upgrade your weapons and gear. Of course, you'll have to earn all that along the way. For now, you're free to look around the Facility or head out to secure your first artifact.
translation: With this promotion, you have access to most of the Facility. Now you have a place to stay and upgrade your weapons and gear. Of course, you'll have to earn all that along the way. For now, you're free to look around the Facility or head out to secure your first artifact.

text: This is the Dormitory. Here, UNPSC Explorers can store their equipment, rest, eat, and sleep until a set time. There's also a healing shower for recovery and a gun vise for weapon maintenance.
translation: This is the Dormitory. Here, UNPSC Explorers can store their equipment, rest, eat, and sleep until a set time. There's also a healing shower for recovery and a gun vise for weapon maintenance.

text: This is the Supply Depot. Explorers can submit their findings from the Radius and unnecessary gear into these Terminals to receive Supply Credits.
translation: This is the Supply Depot. Explorers can submit their findings from the Radius and unnecessary gear into these Terminals to receive Supply Credits.

text: Here, Explorers can obtain guns, gear, and supplies available at their Security Level in exchange for Supply Credits. To obtain items, pick them up and confirm your choice on the Computer.
translation: Here, Explorers can obtain guns, gear, and supplies available at their Security Level in exchange for Supply Credits. To obtain items, pick them up and confirm your choice on the Computer.

text: Warning! The use of any items inside the Supply Depot is strictly prohibited!
translation: Warning! The use of any items inside the Supply Depot is strictly prohibited!

text: Secure your first Artifact using the Artifact Detector.
translation: Secure your first Artifact using the Artifact Detector.

text: Get the Artifact Detector from the Terminal in the Command Room.
translation: Get the Artifact Detector from the Terminal in the Command Room.

text: Locate the Artifact Nest using the Artifact Detector and collect the Artifact.
translation: Locate the Artifact Nest using the Artifact Detector and collect the Artifact.

text: Deliver the Artifact to the Terminal in the Command Room at Facility 27.
translation: Deliver the Artifact to the Terminal in the Command Room at Facility 27.

text: We need artifacts to study the properties of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Especially those able to change matter itself. We want to understand how the Radius creates altered objects including... well, including the Altered like you.
translation: We need artifacts to study the properties of the Pechorsk Anomaly. Especially those able to change matter itself. We want to understand how the Radius creates altered objects including... well, including the Altered like you.

text: Our progress over the past years has been substantial, and I hope we're on the brink of a breakthrough that could alter all of humanity.
translation: Our progress over the past years has been substantial, and I hope we're on the brink of a breakthrough that could alter all of humanity.

text: And you... you might play a key role in that, just as Explorer 61 did in his time.
translation: And you... you might play a key role in that, just as Explorer 61 did in his time.

text: Oh, I almost forgot! Don't get caught in the Tide! Once your Tablet starts beeping loudly – get out of the Radius immediately! I know death isn't the end for you, but still... it won't be pleasant. Good luck!
translation: Oh, I almost forgot! Don't get caught in the Tide! Once your Tablet starts beeping loudly – get out of the Radius immediately! I know death isn't the end for you, but still... it won't be pleasant. Good luck!

text: There's our hero! Already running missions, finding trinkets for the Committee, and rotting at the Facility until you lose your mind from dying and coming back over and over again. Just like they want.
translation: There's our hero! Already running missions, finding trinkets for the Committee, and rotting at the Facility until you lose your mind from dying and coming back over and over again. Just like they want.

text: I have a better option. The strange figure that spoke to you can change everything. If we reach the center of the Radius, we can escape this place. No more Radius, no more Committee. I'm sure of it.
translation: I have a better option. The strange figure that spoke to you can change everything. If we reach the center of the Radius, we can escape this place. No more Radius, no more Committee. I'm sure of it.

text: Wait... You don't remember me, do you? I'm Lauri! Your old friend! The Radius brought the two of us back to life. And now we share the same goal.
translation: Wait... You don't remember me, do you? I'm Lauri! Your old friend! The Radius brought the two of us back to life. And now we share the same goal.

text: I saw they gave you a tablet. Let me see it.
translation: I saw they gave you a tablet. Let me see it.

text: Just put it here. Did you leave it at the Facility?
translation: Just put it here. Did you leave it at the Facility?

text: I'll leave a note, so you remember our plan... Aaand... done!
translation: I'll leave a note, so you remember our plan... Aaand... done!

text: Ha! It worked! I can never get used to this. Can't pick anything up, can't grab a bite, or even have a smoke... I miss having a real body! Okay, that's it.
translation: Ha! It worked! I can never get used to this. Can't pick anything up, can't grab a bite, or even have a smoke... I miss having a real body! Okay, that's it.

text: You've begun running errands for the Committee, right? We can use this to our advantage.
translation: You've begun running errands for the Committee, right? We can use this to our advantage.

text: Keep playing their game for the time being while I look for a way to the center. Stock up on gear and get ready for our escape.
translation: Keep playing their game for the time being while I look for a way to the center. Stock up on gear and get ready for our escape.

text: Now go. Hope they don't blow you up this time!
translation: Now go. Hope they don't blow you up this time!

text: Get armed and equipped by working for the Committee. Together with your Guide, find a path to the Heart of the Radius.
translation: Get armed and equipped by working for the Committee. Together with your Guide, find a path to the Heart of the Radius.

text: Keep discovering new seсtors until you reach the heart of the Radius.
translation: Keep discovering new seсtors until you reach the heart of the Radius.

text: Giving up on that artifact? They might not let you back empty-handed.
translation: Giving up on that artifact? They might not let you back empty-handed.

text: You won't get anything from them if you don't complete their missions.
translation: You won't get anything from them if you don't complete their missions.

text: Got what they wanted, good. The Committee will be pleased!
translation: Got what they wanted, good. The Committee will be pleased!

text: Okay, let's see what you get in return.
translation: Okay, let's see what you get in return.

text: I can't move around like you. But I can be in several places at once.
translation: I can't move around like you. But I can be in several places at once.

text: Too bad I can't just pop up anywhere anytime...
translation: Too bad I can't just pop up anywhere anytime...

text: Great work! What a find! Wish I could go into the Radius myself and get a real artifact! But... I'm just an ordinary human. Not Altered. Definitely not someone who should be going in there. I guess it's better if everyone sticks to what they're good at. Speaking of which, you've earned a promotion! Congratulations!
translation: Great work! What a find! Wish I could go into the Radius myself and get a real artifact! But... I'm just an ordinary human. Not Altered. Definitely not someone who should be going in there. I guess it's better if everyone sticks to what they're good at. Speaking of which, you've earned a promotion! Congratulations!

text: I hope this new gear comes in handy – we've still got so much to do! I think we'll make a great team. Who knows, maybe we'll even get our hands on the Golden Sphere! But let's not jump ahead. Go on, check out with your new toys and get back to the missions.
translation: I hope this new gear comes in handy – we've still got so much to do! I think we'll make a great team. Who knows, maybe we'll even get our hands on the Golden Sphere! But let's not jump ahead. Go on, check out with your new toys and get back to the missions.

text: This is the Armory. Here, Explorers can store their weapons, ammunition, and gear. The Armory is also equipped with gunsmithing and cleaning workplaces.
translation: This is the Armory. Here, Explorers can store their weapons, ammunition, and gear. The Armory is also equipped with gunsmithing and cleaning workplaces.

text: Find a path to the new sector and place the equipment on the marked spot.
translation: Find a path to the new sector and place the equipment on the marked spot.

text: Get the Amplifier from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Amplifier from the Terminal.

text: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
translation: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.

text: Find the Compass Artifact in the Anomaly Cluster marked on the map.
translation: Find the Compass Artifact in the Anomaly Cluster marked on the map.

text: Hold the Compass Artifact close to your palm to absorb it.
translation: Hold the Compass Artifact close to your palm to absorb it.

text: Reach the exit from the current sector.
translation: Reach the exit from the current sector.

text: Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.
translation: Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.

text: Cross the in-between to the next sector
translation: Cross the in-between to the next sector

text: Light the Lamps and follow the Compass to navigate in the in-between.
translation: Light the Lamps and follow the Compass to navigate in the in-between.

text: Place the Ampifier on the marked spot.
translation: Place the Ampifier on the marked spot.

text: Reach the shortcut to the Facility.
translation: Reach the shortcut to the Facility.

text: Return to the Facility and complete the mission.
translation: Return to the Facility and complete the mission.

text: The Pechorsk Anomaly is massive and made up of multiple sectors. And so far, you've only seen one of them. We know that the altered like you can move between them.
translation: The Pechorsk Anomaly is massive and made up of multiple sectors. And so far, you've only seen one of them. We know that the altered like you can move between them.

text: Honestly... I have no idea how you do it. It's still a mystery to us. But right now, you must reach the next sector. I hope you can make it! We need it to carry out further research.
translation: Honestly... I have no idea how you do it. It's still a mystery to us. But right now, you must reach the next sector. I hope you can make it! We need it to carry out further research.

text: To move on, we've gotta go through the "in-between." It's always wrapped in Fog, more unstable, and full of traps.
translation: To move on, we've gotta go through the "in-between." It's always wrapped in Fog, more unstable, and full of traps.

text: It's easy to get lost in there. Crossing it will require moving in a specific pattern. But first, you need to find a slightly unusual artifact. I'll tell you what to do with it.
translation: It's easy to get lost in there. Crossing it will require moving in a specific pattern. But first, you need to find a slightly unusual artifact. I'll tell you what to do with it.

text: I can sense it nearby. Let me mark the spot on the map...
translation: I can sense it nearby. Let me mark the spot on the map...

text: That's it! It'll help you follow me through the in-between. This artifact is special. You can... absorb it. Go on, place it on your hand?
translation: That's it! It'll help you follow me through the in-between. This artifact is special. You can... absorb it. Go on, place it on your hand?

text: Yeah, like that! It's now a part of you. You'll have to use it while we're in the in-between. Might need it more than once. I'll mark the passage for you right away.
translation: Yeah, like that! It's now a part of you. You'll have to use it while we're in the in-between. Might need it more than once. I'll mark the passage for you right away.

text: Look, here's the passage. If we pull this off, it's yours. Anytime you need to get to the next sector, it'll be right here. Our first real step towards the heart of the Radius. Ready? Let's do this.
translation: Look, here's the passage. If we pull this off, it's yours. Anytime you need to get to the next sector, it'll be right here. Our first real step towards the heart of the Radius. Ready? Let's do this.

text: There are special spots with lamps... You have to move through them in the right order to get across. No idea why it works like this but it does. We're right next to one of them. Light the lamp, so I can figure out where we go next.
translation: There are special spots with lamps... You have to move through them in the right order to get across. No idea why it works like this but it does. We're right next to one of them. Light the lamp, so I can figure out where we go next.

text: Yeah! Now use that artifact compass in your hand. Look at your palm.
translation: Yeah! Now use that artifact compass in your hand. Look at your palm.

text: I connected it to the next lamp. Is it working? Hmm, even the compass doesn't work properly here. We don't have a choice, see if you can follow it. I'll meet you at the next spot. If you turn back, I'll be at the passage, too.
translation: I connected it to the next lamp. Is it working? Hmm, even the compass doesn't work properly here. We don't have a choice, see if you can follow it. I'll meet you at the next spot. If you turn back, I'll be at the passage, too.

text: You made it! That thing's handy, right? What would you do without me! See that bridge ahead? Packed with cars and anomalies like an obstacle course...
translation: You made it! That thing's handy, right? What would you do without me! See that bridge ahead? Packed with cars and anomalies like an obstacle course...

text: Hey. The next spot is over there. You'll have to find your way through this rift. No idea what might be hiding there. If you hear voices or anything strange, ignore them. And don't turn around! There are road signs all over the place... Must be there for a reason. Guess someone doesn't want us to get lost in there.
translation: Hey. The next spot is over there. You'll have to find your way through this rift. No idea what might be hiding there. If you hear voices or anything strange, ignore them. And don't turn around! There are road signs all over the place... Must be there for a reason. Guess someone doesn't want us to get lost in there.

text: Glad you made it! Easy to get lost in there walking in circles... until you'd rather put a bullet in your head... Be careful, there are Mimics lying in ambush ahead.
translation: Glad you made it! Easy to get lost in there walking in circles... until you'd rather put a bullet in your head... Be careful, there are Mimics lying in ambush ahead.

text: You did it! See, we make a good team. Light the last lamp and let's get out of here! Here's the exit from the in-between.
translation: You did it! See, we make a good team. Light the last lamp and let's get out of here! Here's the exit from the in-between.

text: See? Step by step, we'll reach the center and get out of here. Here's a new sector. You can use this passage whenever you need it. Won't have to fight through the in-between again, I can just send you here. At least this much I can do. Now you'll have to deal with the mission they gave you. And I'll look for a shortcut back. It should be nearby.
translation: See? Step by step, we'll reach the center and get out of here. Here's a new sector. You can use this passage whenever you need it. Won't have to fight through the in-between again, I can just send you here. At least this much I can do. Now you'll have to deal with the mission they gave you. And I'll look for a shortcut back. It should be nearby.

text: Job's done? Good. I found a path that leads outside... straight into the Committee's arms. Turns out they aren't all that bad. I like Eva too, but... Whatever their good intentions, you can't keep dying for them forever, right? I'm not gonna let that happen. If we want to change it, our only way out is through the center. I'll mark the new passage on your map. Let's head back.
translation: Job's done? Good. I found a path that leads outside... straight into the Committee's arms. Turns out they aren't all that bad. I like Eva too, but... Whatever their good intentions, you can't keep dying for them forever, right? I'm not gonna let that happen. If we want to change it, our only way out is through the center. I'll mark the new passage on your map. Let's head back.

text: Welcome back! I don't know how, but you did it! I've heard some Explorers rely on a voice in their head during missions like this. Sounds insane, but after everything we've learned about the Radius, nothing surprises me anymore... This new sector was closer to the center of the Pechorsk Anomaly. It's stranger and more valuable to our work. I've got a whole plan lined up for researching it! Right now you're not quite ready for the next Top Priority Mission. But you should be able to build experience fast through secondary missions. Good luck, Explorer 73!
translation: Welcome back! I don't know how, but you did it! I've heard some Explorers rely on a voice in their head during missions like this. Sounds insane, but after everything we've learned about the Radius, nothing surprises me anymore... This new sector was closer to the center of the Pechorsk Anomaly. It's stranger and more valuable to our work. I've got a whole plan lined up for researching it! Right now you're not quite ready for the next Top Priority Mission. But you should be able to build experience fast through secondary missions. Good luck, Explorer 73!

text: Before you go any further I gotta warn you about the Tide. This thing brings back all the monsters you've killed, and it will kill you if you don't get away in time. When the Tide is close, you either get out of the Radius or hide in one of my shelters. Let me mark a spot on the map. I'll show you around when you get there.
translation: Before you go any further I gotta warn you about the Tide. This thing brings back all the monsters you've killed, and it will kill you if you don't get away in time. When the Tide is close, you either get out of the Radius or hide in one of my shelters. Let me mark a spot on the map. I'll show you around when you get there.

text: Oh and here's another path that'll get you straight to the new sector!
translation: Oh and here's another path that'll get you straight to the new sector!

text: Meet Lauri at the shelter he marked.
translation: Meet Lauri at the shelter he marked.

text: Reach the shelter marked by Lauri and meet him there.
translation: Reach the shelter marked by Lauri and meet him there.

text: You've dropped some items, go put them up
translation: You've dropped some items, go put them up

text: This is it. It'll keep you safe from the Tide and the enemies. It's like one anomaly inside another. These are the only normal places left in the Radius. At least a small part of our old lives is still here... Right, I'll mark the other shelters on your map so you can find them more easily...
translation: This is it. It'll keep you safe from the Tide and the enemies. It's like one anomaly inside another. These are the only normal places left in the Radius. At least a small part of our old lives is still here... Right, I'll mark the other shelters on your map so you can find them more easily...

text: Reach the isolated location though a Door Anomaly and extract an Artifact from an Invisible Nest.
translation: Reach the isolated location though a Door Anomaly and extract an Artifact from an Invisible Nest.

text: Get the Advanced Artifact Detector from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Advanced Artifact Detector from the Terminal.

text: Locate the Door Anomaly that leads to the Recreation Base and enter it.
translation: Locate the Door Anomaly that leads to the Recreation Base and enter it.

text: Secure the Artifact from the Invisible Nest
translation: Secure the Artifact from the Invisible Nest

text: Locate the Invisible Nest and reveal the Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector.
translation: Locate the Invisible Nest and reveal the Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector.

text: Return to the Facility and submit the Artifact.
translation: Return to the Facility and submit the Artifact.

text: Well... Looks like we really stirred things up! Everyone's running around like crazy! I was even called in to see the boss!.. Anyway, they've put a temporary moratorium on any serious experiments for all Explorers – and some have been reassigned to test the new portals. As for us, we're sticking to the simple stuff – no more complex interventions for now.
translation: Well... Looks like we really stirred things up! Everyone's running around like crazy! I was even called in to see the boss!.. Anyway, they've put a temporary moratorium on any serious experiments for all Explorers – and some have been reassigned to test the new portals. As for us, we're sticking to the simple stuff – no more complex interventions for now.

text: But! There's an upside! With all these portals popping up, we now have access to a pretty interesting spot. It's not just super isolated – it's got these weird artifact nests. Invisible ones!
translation: But! There's an upside! With all these portals popping up, we now have access to a pretty interesting spot. It's not just super isolated – it's got these weird artifact nests. Invisible ones!

text: A regular detector won't pick them up, so here's the upgraded model. Good luck out there! Please try to avoid any more cataclysms this time, okay?
translation: A regular detector won't pick them up, so here's the upgraded model. Good luck out there! Please try to avoid any more cataclysms this time, okay?

text: Well, glad there were no major surprises this time! Looks like the "Doors" stabilized pretty quickly. They seem safe enough to use now. We did great! Quietly reconned a new spot, snagged a hidden artifact, and didn't blow anything up for once. So, how did you like the new detector? Opens up new possibilities, right? Things have calmed down a bit here too. Everything's back to normal. Which means the next big mission's gonna be something else. Just wait.
translation: Well, glad there were no major surprises this time! Looks like the "Doors" stabilized pretty quickly. They seem safe enough to use now. We did great! Quietly reconned a new spot, snagged a hidden artifact, and didn't blow anything up for once. So, how did you like the new detector? Opens up new possibilities, right? Things have calmed down a bit here too. Everything's back to normal. Which means the next big mission's gonna be something else. Just wait.

text: Inspect the Door Anomaly with Throwsonde.
translation: Inspect the Door Anomaly with Throwsonde.

text: Get a Throwsonde from the Terminal.
translation: Get a Throwsonde from the Terminal.

text: Reach the Church and enter its grounds.
translation: Reach the Church and enter its grounds.

text: Find a way to unlock the Church door using the clues from the church grounds.
translation: Find a way to unlock the Church door using the clues from the church grounds.

text: Activate the Throwsonde and throw it into the Door Anomaly.
translation: Activate the Throwsonde and throw it into the Door Anomaly.

text: Collect the Throwsonde and deliver it to the Facility.
translation: Collect the Throwsonde and deliver it to the Facility.

text: The Radius never stops surprising us. We've discovered a brand new type of anomaly – this one with teleportation properties. Just imagine how much we could learn from them!
translation: The Radius never stops surprising us. We've discovered a brand new type of anomaly – this one with teleportation properties. Just imagine how much we could learn from them!

text: These anomalies are extremely rare. You need to reach one of them as soon as possible and launch these newly developed throwsondes into it so we can get the data we need.
translation: These anomalies are extremely rare. You need to reach one of them as soon as possible and launch these newly developed throwsondes into it so we can get the data we need.

text: According to our intel, getting there won't be easy – so you might need to improvise and stay sharp. I think you're up for it!
translation: According to our intel, getting there won't be easy – so you might need to improvise and stay sharp. I think you're up for it!

text: Poking around those "doors" is a bold move! Look, that is no ordinary church. It's locked up, so you'll have to find a way inside. The bells might be worth a closer look – they seem to be protecting it.
translation: Poking around those "doors" is a bold move! Look, that is no ordinary church. It's locked up, so you'll have to find a way inside. The bells might be worth a closer look – they seem to be protecting it.

text: Gotta ring the bells four times before the service starts. But what's the order? Why did I say I knew how to do it?
translation: Gotta ring the bells four times before the service starts. But what's the order? Why did I say I knew how to do it?

text: Look, the first star! Or is that a satellite?
translation: Look, the first star! Or is that a satellite?

text: Grab an umbrella! They said on the radio a storm's coming at two.
translation: Grab an umbrella! They said on the radio a storm's coming at two.

text: Okay, so the third word's "crescent". What a tricky scanword!
translation: Okay, so the third word's "crescent". What a tricky scanword!

text: ...the Sun is the last one to go to sleep. Sweet dreams, my dear...
translation: ...the Sun is the last one to go to sleep. Sweet dreams, my dear...

text: Oh, I'm so glad you're okay! We detected a massive disturbance! And then – a full-blown chain reaction! Absolutely incredible!.. It triggered multiple portals across different sectors. Can you believe it?! A real Resonance Cascade! I wonder what it actually feels like – stepping through that magic “door”..! Does your every single cell shift through space? Or does it just tear you apart at the entrance and put you back together at the exit? And after that – are you still the same you or just a copy?.. My head's spinning even thinking about it! Let the scientists figure that one out. We'll keep doing what we do best – right, Explorer 73?
translation: Oh, I'm so glad you're okay! We detected a massive disturbance! And then – a full-blown chain reaction! Absolutely incredible!.. It triggered multiple portals across different sectors. Can you believe it?! A real Resonance Cascade! I wonder what it actually feels like – stepping through that magic “door”..! Does your every single cell shift through space? Or does it just tear you apart at the entrance and put you back together at the exit? And after that – are you still the same you or just a copy?.. My head's spinning even thinking about it! Let the scientists figure that one out. We'll keep doing what we do best – right, Explorer 73?

text: TOP: It's All About the Distortion
translation: TOP: It's All About the Distortion

text: Take measurements with the Distortion Sensor in the Distortion Zone and test the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype.
translation: Take measurements with the Distortion Sensor in the Distortion Zone and test the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype.

text: Get the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Distortion-Proof Headgear Prototype from the Terminal.

text: Retrieve the Distortion Sensor from the marked Distortion Zone.
translation: Retrieve the Distortion Sensor from the marked Distortion Zone.

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the first marked spot.
translation: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the first marked spot.

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
translation: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the next marked spot.
translation: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the next marked spot.

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
translation: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.

text: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the last marked spot.
translation: Place the unfolded Distortion Sensor on the last marked spot.

text: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.
translation: Press the button on the Sensor to start measurements and wait for the process to complete.

text: Deliver the Distortion Sensor to the Terminal at Facility 27.
translation: Deliver the Distortion Sensor to the Terminal at Facility 27.

text: The Distortion Zones are relatively new to us. We don't fully understand their nature yet, but they damage both our equipment and Explorers.
translation: The Distortion Zones are relatively new to us. We don't fully understand their nature yet, but they damage both our equipment and Explorers.

text: But there's good news – we've learned to shield our devices from the effect. And now we need you to take measurements and bring back one of those protected devices from the Distortion Zone – the one your colleague deployed earlier.
translation: But there's good news – we've learned to shield our devices from the effect. And now we need you to take measurements and bring back one of those protected devices from the Distortion Zone – the one your colleague deployed earlier.

text: You'll also be field-testing a protective headgear. In theory, it should let you to explore Distortion Zones without dying. We understand that rebirth is not completely free for you, after all. It's still just a prototype, of course... but I really hope it helps you get out of there alive and... mostly intact. Good luck!
translation: You'll also be field-testing a protective headgear. In theory, it should let you to explore Distortion Zones without dying. We understand that rebirth is not completely free for you, after all. It's still just a prototype, of course... but I really hope it helps you get out of there alive and... mostly intact. Good luck!

text: I hope that little mask works better than it looks. So... back in the day, Explorers would just run into Distortion Zones without any mask... desperately trying to set up a sensor before dropping dead? Well, at least they're providing you with some gear now! We'll need all the help if we ever want to escape this place.
translation: I hope that little mask works better than it looks. So... back in the day, Explorers would just run into Distortion Zones without any mask... desperately trying to set up a sensor before dropping dead? Well, at least they're providing you with some gear now! We'll need all the help if we ever want to escape this place.

text: You good? So that thing did help after all. I know you can come back. But sending you off to die, over and over again, just so their scientists get the data... all the while hiding behind excuses like “for the good of mankind”... That's not right. That's not human. I hope Eva doesn't end up like them...
translation: You good? So that thing did help after all. I know you can come back. But sending you off to die, over and over again, just so their scientists get the data... all the while hiding behind excuses like “for the good of mankind”... That's not right. That's not human. I hope Eva doesn't end up like them...

text: Excellent work! The data we got is absolutely incredible! Readings from the protected devices are completely clean! And hey – the protection worked for you too! So all that suffering wasn't for nothing! See? Little by little, we're starting to adapt to the Radius. That means we gotta keep pushing. Sooner or later, we'll create something groundbreaking! Something that could change the world! And you can keep the prototype. We already know what needs fixing. The final model will be out for all Explorers soon enough!
translation: Excellent work! The data we got is absolutely incredible! Readings from the protected devices are completely clean! And hey – the protection worked for you too! So all that suffering wasn't for nothing! See? Little by little, we're starting to adapt to the Radius. That means we gotta keep pushing. Sooner or later, we'll create something groundbreaking! Something that could change the world! And you can keep the prototype. We already know what needs fixing. The final model will be out for all Explorers soon enough!

text: Find a path to the new sector and secure an unstable Artifact.
translation: Find a path to the new sector and secure an unstable Artifact.

text: Get the Artifact Container Prototype from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Artifact Container Prototype from the Terminal.

text: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
translation: Find a path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.

text: Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.
translation: Shake Lauri's hand to get pulled to the in-between.

text: Travel throught the in-between with Lauri using the Compass on your palm and lighting up the lamps.
translation: Travel throught the in-between with Lauri using the Compass on your palm and lighting up the lamps.

text: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector. Place the Artifact into the Container Prototype.
translation: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact using the Advanced Artifact Detector. Place the Artifact into the Container Prototype.

text: Deliver the Container with Artifact to Facility 27.
translation: Deliver the Container with Artifact to Facility 27.

text: Alright, it's time for us to move forward. You'll need to find your way to a sector that lies deeper in the Radius, closer to its center.
translation: Alright, it's time for us to move forward. You'll need to find your way to a sector that lies deeper in the Radius, closer to its center.

text: You know... going through the passage, you completely vanished from all our scanners for a while. I got so scared then!.. But now I'm sure you'll make it through again – nothing to worry about! Safe journey, Explorer 73! Can't wait to see you back!
translation: You know... going through the passage, you completely vanished from all our scanners for a while. I got so scared then!.. But now I'm sure you'll make it through again – nothing to worry about! Safe journey, Explorer 73! Can't wait to see you back!

text: So the Committee sent you to the next sector... I bet as soon as we're ready to go to the center, they'll suddenly have a job for us. Their own little mission. They always do... Okay, we'll deal with it when we get there. I've looked around the sectors we've been to and found a passage.
translation: So the Committee sent you to the next sector... I bet as soon as we're ready to go to the center, they'll suddenly have a job for us. Their own little mission. They always do... Okay, we'll deal with it when we get there. I've looked around the sectors we've been to and found a passage.

text: I hate this place! All this buzzing like an old TV... Eva will probably lose track of you again... Alright, same drill as before: you light the lamps, I tune your compass, you follow it, and I'll clear the path ahead. We'll need to get through these woods first. There's a lot of “Dandelions” ahead, so watch your step!
translation: I hate this place! All this buzzing like an old TV... Eva will probably lose track of you again... Alright, same drill as before: you light the lamps, I tune your compass, you follow it, and I'll clear the path ahead. We'll need to get through these woods first. There's a lot of “Dandelions” ahead, so watch your step!
