text: Our next lamp should be right across the lake. Choose which way you want to go around it. I have a feeling the “locals” won't be too happy to see you.
translation: Our next lamp should be right across the lake. Choose which way you want to go around it. I have a feeling the “locals” won't be too happy to see you.

text: Good! We're almost out of the woods. The next spot is a power line tower. It's right between the forest and the swamps. In the fog it'll stand out like a beacon, you can't miss it.
translation: Good! We're almost out of the woods. The next spot is a power line tower. It's right between the forest and the swamps. In the fog it'll stand out like a beacon, you can't miss it.

text: Alright, now we have to cross the swamps. Take it slow, and please try not to drown. Also I bet there are a bunch of those invisible things crawling around. Keep your distance, don't let them catch you!
translation: Alright, now we have to cross the swamps. Take it slow, and please try not to drown. Also I bet there are a bunch of those invisible things crawling around. Keep your distance, don't let them catch you!

text: We're halfway through the swamps. Those invisible things aren't going anywhere, and Mimics could show up as backup too.
translation: We're halfway through the swamps. Those invisible things aren't going anywhere, and Mimics could show up as backup too.

text: Damn, that was like an action movie! Remind me not to get on your bad side. Anyway, you can relax a little. Just make it across this pass and we're out of the in-between. It's blocked with rocks, so you'll have to squeeze through. Keep an eye out for anomalies. I'll be waiting at the exit!
translation: Damn, that was like an action movie! Remind me not to get on your bad side. Anyway, you can relax a little. Just make it across this pass and we're out of the in-between. It's blocked with rocks, so you'll have to squeeze through. Keep an eye out for anomalies. I'll be waiting at the exit!

text: Finally! The exit's right over there. Light that lamp and let's get the hell outta here. I'm sick of this place...
translation: Finally! The exit's right over there. Light that lamp and let's get the hell outta here. I'm sick of this place...

text: Phew, catching up with you can be a real pain... I've got good news and bad news. Good news – I found another passage from here. It's ready, use it anytime. Bad news – it won't take you back to the Facility. It'll only drop you somewhere else in the same sector. Better than nothing I guess. We gotta head back. Your call how to get there.
translation: Phew, catching up with you can be a real pain... I've got good news and bad news. Good news – I found another passage from here. It's ready, use it anytime. Bad news – it won't take you back to the Facility. It'll only drop you somewhere else in the same sector. Better than nothing I guess. We gotta head back. Your call how to get there.

text: Hey! You okay? I knew you'd make it. So, what did you think of the new sector? Our data says it's larger and more dangerous. The stakes are getting higher the closer we get to the center. Oh, and congrats on the promotion! We greatly appreciate your contribution and this bonus is our way of showing it. I can also tell you now that we've developed a medication for your dependency on the Radius. You'll be able to live a normal life outside the Facility! But to receive it, you need Security Level 7. It's only granted for an outstanding contribution. We have every reason to work even harder!
translation: Hey! You okay? I knew you'd make it. So, what did you think of the new sector? Our data says it's larger and more dangerous. The stakes are getting higher the closer we get to the center. Oh, and congrats on the promotion! We greatly appreciate your contribution and this bonus is our way of showing it. I can also tell you now that we've developed a medication for your dependency on the Radius. You'll be able to live a normal life outside the Facility! But to receive it, you need Security Level 7. It's only granted for an outstanding contribution. We have every reason to work even harder!

text: Secure and use the Door Artifact. The Sensors marked on the map will help you obtain it.
translation: Secure and use the Door Artifact. The Sensors marked on the map will help you obtain it.

text: Get the Door Artifact Activator from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Door Artifact Activator from the Terminal.

text: Place the Artifact into the Activator
translation: Place the Artifact into the Activator

text: Place the Sensors in the Unstable Nest area to limit its movements.
translation: Place the Sensors in the Unstable Nest area to limit its movements.

text: Use the Door Artifact Activator on the marked spot to activate Door Artifact and trigger the Door Anomaly.
translation: Use the Door Artifact Activator on the marked spot to activate Door Artifact and trigger the Door Anomaly.

text: Go through the Door Anomaly to check where it leads.
translation: Go through the Door Anomaly to check where it leads.

text: Deliver the Door Artifact Activator to the Terminal at the Facility.
translation: Deliver the Door Artifact Activator to the Terminal at the Facility.

text: We may not be able to control the anomalous "Doors" directly. But if certain artifacts can interact with them... Think of the possibilities this could open up for us – and for other Explorers!
translation: We may not be able to control the anomalous "Doors" directly. But if certain artifacts can interact with them... Think of the possibilities this could open up for us – and for other Explorers!

text: We prepared a device that will activate the special artifact. You'll need to field-test it in the Radius. Keep in mind, activation must occur at a specific location. Otherwise, the data will be compromised.
translation: We prepared a device that will activate the special artifact. You'll need to field-test it in the Radius. Keep in mind, activation must occur at a specific location. Otherwise, the data will be compromised.

text: You didn't believe all their promises about the medicine, did you? I bet Eva had no idea whether that medicine even existed. They just had to tell her and she ran off to dangle that carrot in front you. Why would they offer you freedom anyway? You are a perfect fit for their dirty work. You can't go anywhere and your lifespan is almost infinite. They gotta be out of their minds to let you go.
translation: You didn't believe all their promises about the medicine, did you? I bet Eva had no idea whether that medicine even existed. They just had to tell her and she ran off to dangle that carrot in front you. Why would they offer you freedom anyway? You are a perfect fit for their dirty work. You can't go anywhere and your lifespan is almost infinite. They gotta be out of their minds to let you go.

text: See? I knew it would work. It's like our own Evacuation Device, except this time you don't get torn to shreds! Oh... sorry about that. Still, even when you die, you just come back like nothing happened, don't you? I mean, who wouldn't want that kind of power? In any case, the device performed very well. It's a pity this artifact is so rare, but we're still going to study its potential. I'm sure we'll find a way to put it to good use. Oh, and by the way... we're very close to a breakthrough in understanding how the Radius alters things, and both of us might play a big part in that.
translation: See? I knew it would work. It's like our own Evacuation Device, except this time you don't get torn to shreds! Oh... sorry about that. Still, even when you die, you just come back like nothing happened, don't you? I mean, who wouldn't want that kind of power? In any case, the device performed very well. It's a pity this artifact is so rare, but we're still going to study its potential. I'm sure we'll find a way to put it to good use. Oh, and by the way... we're very close to a breakthrough in understanding how the Radius alters things, and both of us might play a big part in that.

text: Look at you! Didn't even need my help to make that clean jump back to the outside world. Right after your jump, I felt something new appear in that sector, a strange passage. Nothing like the ones I normally use to move you around. Let's check it out. I can't tell where it leads yet, but it could be useful.
translation: Look at you! Didn't even need my help to make that clean jump back to the outside world. Right after your jump, I felt something new appear in that sector, a strange passage. Nothing like the ones I normally use to move you around. Let's check it out. I can't tell where it leads yet, but it could be useful.

text: Check where the strange passage that suddenly appeared leads to.
translation: Check where the strange passage that suddenly appeared leads to.

text: Reach the entrance to the strange passage.
translation: Reach the entrance to the strange passage.

text: Find out where the strange passage leads.
translation: Find out where the strange passage leads.

text: Would you look at that!.. I've never seen anything like it in this sector before. It's like this place was hidden... or maybe it didn't even exist until you jumped here. Did you notice? This passage doesn't have my usual "entrance". The Radius never stops surprising me... Well, you've got yourself another shortcut. Use it anytime!
translation: Would you look at that!.. I've never seen anything like it in this sector before. It's like this place was hidden... or maybe it didn't even exist until you jumped here. Did you notice? This passage doesn't have my usual "entrance". The Radius never stops surprising me... Well, you've got yourself another shortcut. Use it anytime!

text: Carry out an experiment on the provided living organism. The Portable Alteration Unit should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.
translation: Carry out an experiment on the provided living organism. The Portable Alteration Unit should be carried on the back instead of a backpack.

text: Get the Alteration Unit, Supercapacitor, and Artifact Container from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Alteration Unit, Supercapacitor, and Artifact Container from the Terminal.

text: Charge the Supercapacitor from any Electrostatic Anomaly to power the Alteration Unit.
translation: Charge the Supercapacitor from any Electrostatic Anomaly to power the Alteration Unit.

text: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact, and place it into the Artifact Container.
translation: Locate and reveal the unstable Artifact, and place it into the Artifact Container.

text: Assemble and place the Alteration Unit
translation: Assemble and place the Alteration Unit

text: Insert the charged Supercapacitor and Artifact Container with Artifact into the Alteration Unit and place it on the marked spot.
translation: Insert the charged Supercapacitor and Artifact Container with Artifact into the Alteration Unit and place it on the marked spot.

text: Press the button to start the alteration process.
translation: Press the button to start the alteration process.

text: Wait for the process to complete.
translation: Wait for the process to complete.

text: Check the result of the alteration experiment.
translation: Check the result of the alteration experiment.

text: Complete the mission at the Facility.
translation: Complete the mission at the Facility.

text: Explorer 73, we've been given a mission that could be incredibly important for the Committee, and for humanity itself. Are you ready? We need to make sure we've really found a way to deliberately alter living organisms using artifacts.
translation: Explorer 73, we've been given a mission that could be incredibly important for the Committee, and for humanity itself. Are you ready? We need to make sure we've really found a way to deliberately alter living organisms using artifacts.

text: It won't be easy. You may even have to die a few times along the way, though it shouldn't be a big deal for you at this point, right? I'm sure you can make it. Good luck and take care of your new little friend!
translation: It won't be easy. You may even have to die a few times along the way, though it shouldn't be a big deal for you at this point, right? I'm sure you can make it. Good luck and take care of your new little friend!

text: So, the Committee decided to reach for something meant for God alone... and the Radius. They've got some nerve. And ambition. You know what I can't stand about all this? They want someone else to do the dirty work out there. They sit safe and sound, taking all the credit... and what's left for you? They talk about "happiness for everyone," but someone always has to pay the price for science. This time it's that poor animal. Next time who will it be? You? Is all this really worth it?
translation: So, the Committee decided to reach for something meant for God alone... and the Radius. They've got some nerve. And ambition. You know what I can't stand about all this? They want someone else to do the dirty work out there. They sit safe and sound, taking all the credit... and what's left for you? They talk about "happiness for everyone," but someone always has to pay the price for science. This time it's that poor animal. Next time who will it be? You? Is all this really worth it?

text: Hey, are you okay? I know that was hard, but look at the payoff. It's not exactly what we were hoping for, but we still managed to alter a living organism. Not a human being yet, but we're so close now! Ah, the report's in. Let's see... We did it! The experiment was a success. It seems this particular alteration was caused by an additional influence of the Radius. Our scientists will try to reproduce it in labs outside. And that's not all, you and I have been chosen for the next crucial step. We did great!
translation: Hey, are you okay? I know that was hard, but look at the payoff. It's not exactly what we were hoping for, but we still managed to alter a living organism. Not a human being yet, but we're so close now! Ah, the report's in. Let's see... We did it! The experiment was a success. It seems this particular alteration was caused by an additional influence of the Radius. Our scientists will try to reproduce it in labs outside. And that's not all, you and I have been chosen for the next crucial step. We did great!

text: Deliver the special Artifact to the Facility.
translation: Deliver the special Artifact to the Facility.

text: Get the Door Artifact Activator and wristband from the Terminal.
translation: Get the Door Artifact Activator and wristband from the Terminal.

text: Put on the wristband to pair it with the Activator.
translation: Put on the wristband to pair it with the Activator.

text: Locate and place the Door Artifact into the Activator.
translation: Locate and place the Door Artifact into the Activator.

text: Find the path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
translation: Find the path to the new sector of the Pechorsk Anomaly.

text: Find the way to the center
translation: Find the way to the center

text: Check if you can get to the center from the marked spot.
translation: Check if you can get to the center from the marked spot.

text: Put the elevator buttons back into the control panels and open the door.
translation: Put the elevator buttons back into the control panels and open the door.

text: Dive into the Sphere to reach the center of the Radius.
translation: Dive into the Sphere to reach the center of the Radius.

text: Okay... this is it. What we're about to do could change humanity's fate, and I'm not exaggerating. The stakes have never been higher for the Committee. Our new device can grant your abilities to an ordinary person without binding them to the Radius. If this works, we could free humanity from disease, aging... even death.
translation: Okay... this is it. What we're about to do could change humanity's fate, and I'm not exaggerating. The stakes have never been higher for the Committee. Our new device can grant your abilities to an ordinary person without binding them to the Radius. If this works, we could free humanity from disease, aging... even death.

text: But to make that happen, we need a powerful artifact capable of profound alterations – the Golden Sphere, hidden at the very heart of the Radius. You have to reach it and bring it to us. If you complete this mission, you'll be granted immediate Security Level 7 clearance and the medicine. You'll be able to leave the Facility for good and live a normal life. And you'll be the first to ever earn that right.
translation: But to make that happen, we need a powerful artifact capable of profound alterations – the Golden Sphere, hidden at the very heart of the Radius. You have to reach it and bring it to us. If you complete this mission, you'll be granted immediate Security Level 7 clearance and the medicine. You'll be able to leave the Facility for good and live a normal life. And you'll be the first to ever earn that right.

text: Honestly, we don't know what lies that deep within the Pechorsk Anomaly. Explorer 61 was the only one ever confirmed to have made it that far, and... vanished without a trace. So... I know you can do this and make it back. But... I'm scared for you... Please, be careful... and come back, Explorer 73...
translation: Honestly, we don't know what lies that deep within the Pechorsk Anomaly. Explorer 61 was the only one ever confirmed to have made it that far, and... vanished without a trace. So... I know you can do this and make it back. But... I'm scared for you... Please, be careful... and come back, Explorer 73...

text: Ha! So the Committee wants our ticket out? The Golden Sphere? They're not getting it. That thing's ours. I found the way to the center. First, we pass through the in-between again. Then we fight our way through a new, smaller sector. Through there we'll enter the heart of the Radius. Do you think we should get that artifact just to be safe? Alright, I'll be waiting by the passages!
translation: Ha! So the Committee wants our ticket out? The Golden Sphere? They're not getting it. That thing's ours. I found the way to the center. First, we pass through the in-between again. Then we fight our way through a new, smaller sector. Through there we'll enter the heart of the Radius. Do you think we should get that artifact just to be safe? Alright, I'll be waiting by the passages!

text: Let's clear a path to the sector near the center. Guess this place doesn't care about physics. The ground is all broken up. You'll have to jump and climb to get across. Keep your eyes peeled. We're not alone here. Also please don't fall. I promise there's nothing down there...
translation: Let's clear a path to the sector near the center. Guess this place doesn't care about physics. The ground is all broken up. You'll have to jump and climb to get across. Keep your eyes peeled. We're not alone here. Also please don't fall. I promise there's nothing down there...

text: You good? Feeling dizzy yet? Catch your breath. One wrong step, and you're flying into the abyss. Get to that larger piece of ground. After a few more like that, climb up and you'll see the lamp.
translation: You good? Feeling dizzy yet? Catch your breath. One wrong step, and you're flying into the abyss. Get to that larger piece of ground. After a few more like that, climb up and you'll see the lamp.

text: Look at that! What a crazy view....fascinating, isn't it? Follow these rail tracks over the abyss, then cross the bridge. I'll meet you on the other side. Let's just hope no trains come through here...
translation: Look at that! What a crazy view....fascinating, isn't it? Follow these rail tracks over the abyss, then cross the bridge. I'll meet you on the other side. Let's just hope no trains come through here...

text: The next large piece is covered by anomalies. Take it slow and put those probes to good use.
translation: The next large piece is covered by anomalies. Take it slow and put those probes to good use.

text: That's it! We made it. The next sector is no better than this one... Keep going and you'll reach it. You'll find a familiar place there, at least I hope it's still familiar to you... I'll meet you in the shelter near the passage.
translation: That's it! We made it. The next sector is no better than this one... Keep going and you'll reach it. You'll find a familiar place there, at least I hope it's still familiar to you... I'll meet you in the shelter near the passage.

text: Ever missed the school? Feels like taking exams all over again. You can take this elevator up, just find a way to open it. Look for whatever operates it... buttons, maybe, or something like that. You get the idea.
translation: Ever missed the school? Feels like taking exams all over again. You can take this elevator up, just find a way to open it. Look for whatever operates it... buttons, maybe, or something like that. You get the idea.

text: After the upper floors you'll find what looks like a shelter. Jump inside it. It'll take you... us to the Presence. It's waiting, I can feel it. You know... It was great to see you again. Can't say I was happy with the part I had to play... But I'm glad I could make it this far, side by side with a friend. Let's finish this.
translation: After the upper floors you'll find what looks like a shelter. Jump inside it. It'll take you... us to the Presence. It's waiting, I can feel it. You know... It was great to see you again. Can't say I was happy with the part I had to play... But I'm glad I could make it this far, side by side with a friend. Let's finish this.

text: It's time to make your final choice.
translation: It's time to make your final choice.

text: We have it! Don't miss your chance! It's now or never...
translation: We have it! Don't miss your chance! It's now or never...

text: Damn it! Of course the Committee had to interfere! Goddamn Eva and her scientists...
translation: Damn it! Of course the Committee had to interfere! Goddamn Eva and her scientists...

text: This was predictable. We will introduce an external factor into the choice.
translation: This was predictable. We will introduce an external factor into the choice.

text: Oh, I'm so done with these UNPSC dogs and their toys!..
translation: Oh, I'm so done with these UNPSC dogs and their toys!..

text: Behold what you call the Golden Sphere.
translation: Behold what you call the Golden Sphere.

text: It is a symbol. It is energy. It is will.
translation: It is a symbol. It is energy. It is will.

text: Whom will you choose? Who shall be left with nothing or be destroyed?
translation: Whom will you choose? Who shall be left with nothing or be destroyed?

text: Will you grant a full life to your Guide?
translation: Will you grant a full life to your Guide?

text: /this shadow is in so much pain.../
translation: /this shadow is in so much pain.../

text: Or will you assist the Committee in altering humanity?
translation: Or will you assist the Committee in altering humanity?

text: Or will you sever yourself from the Radius?
translation: Or will you sever yourself from the Radius?

text: Don't mind me! After all, I'm just a shadow of someone you called a friend. Save yourself!
translation: Don't mind me! After all, I'm just a shadow of someone you called a friend. Save yourself!

text: Just ignore the Committee's orders. Don't sacrifice your life and freedom for their ambitions!
translation: Just ignore the Committee's orders. Don't sacrifice your life and freedom for their ambitions!

text: Decide who will receive the Golden Sphere. All else shall be purged...
translation: Decide who will receive the Golden Sphere. All else shall be purged...

text: It is time! Show me what you value most...
translation: It is time! Show me what you value most...

text: No!!! Choose yourself! You're gonna die for good!
translation: No!!! Choose yourself! You're gonna die for good!

text: Don't let them have the Sphere! You'll get us both killed!
translation: Don't let them have the Sphere! You'll get us both killed!

text: Yes! Do it! Live your new life!
translation: Yes! Do it! Live your new life!

text: Goodbye, my friend!.. Don't forget me...
translation: Goodbye, my friend!.. Don't forget me...

text: But what about you?.. How will I live without...
translation: But what about you?.. How will I live without...

text: That damn Eva has brainwashed you!.. NOOOO!!!...
translation: That damn Eva has brainwashed you!.. NOOOO!!!...

text: What did you do?! You'll no longer be human!!! NOOOO!!!...
translation: What did you do?! You'll no longer be human!!! NOOOO!!!...

text: We will reveal the future you've chosen...
translation: We will reveal the future you've chosen...

text: lives an ordinary life in the outside world.
translation: lives an ordinary life in the outside world.

text: He is a good person. He is trying to be a good husband, father, and neighbor.
translation: He is a good person. He is trying to be a good husband, father, and neighbor.

text: he has no one he could truly call a friend.
translation: he has no one he could truly call a friend.

text: And he often blames himself for the way things ended.
translation: And he often blames himself for the way things ended.

text: He often thinks of the Radius and what you've been through together.
translation: He often thinks of the Radius and what you've been through together.

text: Sometimes he wishes he could forget.
translation: Sometimes he wishes he could forget.

text: But he knows that he once was and will always be a part of the Radius.
translation: But he knows that he once was and will always be a part of the Radius.

text: She reached her goal, she delivered results.
translation: She reached her goal, she delivered results.

text: Another one of the Committee's attempts has succeeded. An ordinary person has been Altered.
translation: Another one of the Committee's attempts has succeeded. An ordinary person has been Altered.

text: ...and nobody seems to care, except for her...
translation: ...and nobody seems to care, except for her...

text: For her, it's too high a price to pay for whatever this is all building toward.
translation: For her, it's too high a price to pay for whatever this is all building toward.

text: One more thing she knows is that the Committee's leaders are negotiating with those who wield money and power in the outside world.
translation: One more thing she knows is that the Committee's leaders are negotiating with those who wield money and power in the outside world.

text: And she doesn't like where this is heading at all.
translation: And she doesn't like where this is heading at all.

text: You live your normal life as an ordinary person in the outside world, like millions of others.
translation: You live your normal life as an ordinary person in the outside world, like millions of others.

text: You cope well. But you're alone among all those people and that never seems to change.
translation: You cope well. But you're alone among all those people and that never seems to change.

text: You don't owe anything to anyone in this world. But all your sense of meaning, all your purpose – it was left behind, inside the Radius.
translation: You don't owe anything to anyone in this world. But all your sense of meaning, all your purpose – it was left behind, inside the Radius.

text: You even tried to find Eva once. But you couldn't.
translation: You even tried to find Eva once. But you couldn't.

text: But the Committee found you. And your life is full of color again.
translation: But the Committee found you. And your life is full of color again.

text: You already know there's only one place on Earth where you can hide forever.
translation: You already know there's only one place on Earth where you can hide forever.

text: Rejecting all that is human is itself very human.
translation: Rejecting all that is human is itself very human.

text: In return, we gave you knowledge.
translation: In return, we gave you knowledge.

text: You have an eternity to search for answers in the Radius. You have fully adapted to it and have even become a part of it.
translation: You have an eternity to search for answers in the Radius. You have fully adapted to it and have even become a part of it.

text: Seeing this place brings it all back. We managed to get the vouchers through the union and came here. Felt like the whole place was ours! You with your new tape recorder and me with my old guitar. Everybody loved hanging around us, playing volleyball, swimming in the pool, singing and dancing... I miss those days.
translation: Seeing this place brings it all back. We managed to get the vouchers through the union and came here. Felt like the whole place was ours! You with your new tape recorder and me with my old guitar. Everybody loved hanging around us, playing volleyball, swimming in the pool, singing and dancing... I miss those days.

text: All this fog... it's everywhere. Along the outer edge, around the stable zones, throughout the in-between. It's thick. Unsettling. It makes everything look blurred and uncertain. Like a smoke screen. Perfect for hiding things, or making you doubt what you're seeing...
translation: All this fog... it's everywhere. Along the outer edge, around the stable zones, throughout the in-between. It's thick. Unsettling. It makes everything look blurred and uncertain. Like a smoke screen. Perfect for hiding things, or making you doubt what you're seeing...

text: So... is any of this actually real, or not? The outside world, the Committee, Eva... they're real. You're real too. And I guess I am, in some way. You can see me, hear me... so I must be here for a reason. But everything in the Radius... It feels real, but none of it makes sense, as if the Radius is playing mind games with us.
translation: So... is any of this actually real, or not? The outside world, the Committee, Eva... they're real. You're real too. And I guess I am, in some way. You can see me, hear me... so I must be here for a reason. But everything in the Radius... It feels real, but none of it makes sense, as if the Radius is playing mind games with us.

text: Just look at all these gloomy figures! Standing around frozen like statues. Creeps me out seeing so many of them together. Could be people we knew back in our old lives... Everyone from Pechorsk – all with such different fates now. You, me, them... everyone...
translation: Just look at all these gloomy figures! Standing around frozen like statues. Creeps me out seeing so many of them together. Could be people we knew back in our old lives... Everyone from Pechorsk – all with such different fates now. You, me, them... everyone...

text: Remember this station? I used to come here with my grandad when I was a kid. He worked on the railroad. You and I used to hang around this place a lot. Running between trains, going down to the river, hiding in the woods... Can't say much has changed, huh?
translation: Remember this station? I used to come here with my grandad when I was a kid. He worked on the railroad. You and I used to hang around this place a lot. Running between trains, going down to the river, hiding in the woods... Can't say much has changed, huh?

text: Do you ever miss Pechorsk? Our old life? It's all gone now. The only place where it still exists is here, in the Radius. Like a distorted, distant echo... I wonder if that... Presence... could bring everything back? 1987? Maybe have the Radius appear elsewhere instead? Or just not appear at all...
translation: Do you ever miss Pechorsk? Our old life? It's all gone now. The only place where it still exists is here, in the Radius. Like a distorted, distant echo... I wonder if that... Presence... could bring everything back? 1987? Maybe have the Radius appear elsewhere instead? Or just not appear at all...

text:
Welcome to the UNPSC Explorer's Handbook!
This is the only official data repository for UNPSC Explorers. It contains the information you need to carry out your work, all in one place and always within reach.
Keep in mind that not all information will be available to you immediately. Your personal Explorer's Handbook will be updated as you receive new gear and equipment, accept new missions, and increase your Access Level.
Check your Explorer's Handbook whenever you're unsure, stuck, or need help.
translation:
Welcome to the UNPSC Explorer's Handbook!
This is the only official data repository for UNPSC Explorers. It contains the information you need to carry out your work, all in one place and always within reach.
Keep in mind that not all information will be available to you immediately. Your personal Explorer's Handbook will be updated as you receive new gear and equipment, accept new missions, and increase your Access Level.
Check your Explorer's Handbook whenever you're unsure, stuck, or need help.

text:
The United Nations Pechorsk Special Committee (UNPSC) is a specialized agency of the United Nations (UN) established in 1987 to contain and research the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The Committee controls the Pechorsk Security Zone (PSZ), which includes the territory of the Pechorsk Anomaly and a small area surrounding it.
PSZ has an Inner and Outer Perimeter, with Security and Research Facilities located between them.
<L1>The Committee's research of the Pechorsk Anomaly is carried out from the inside by authorized UNPSC Explorers, who have access to the dedicated UNPSC Explorer Facilities.</L1>
translation:
The United Nations Pechorsk Special Committee (UNPSC) is a specialized agency of the United Nations (UN) established in 1987 to contain and research the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The Committee controls the Pechorsk Security Zone (PSZ), which includes the territory of the Pechorsk Anomaly and a small area surrounding it.
PSZ has an Inner and Outer Perimeter, with Security and Research Facilities located between them.
<L1>The Committee's research of the Pechorsk Anomaly is carried out from the inside by authorized UNPSC Explorers, who have access to the dedicated UNPSC Explorer Facilities.</L1>

text:
UNPSC Explorers are contractors responsible for the research of the Pechorsk Anomaly from within.
UNPSC Explorers are selected from among Altered Humans due to their ability to enter and exit the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The Explorers are stationed at UNPSC Explorer Facilities, which are located withing the PSZ Inner Perimeter at the edge of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
<L1>UNPSC Explorer's main objectives are gathering Altered Items and special Artifacts inside the Pechorsk Anomaly as well as carrying out Top Priority and regular Missions across the Pechorsk Anomaly Segments.</L1>
translation:
UNPSC Explorers are contractors responsible for the research of the Pechorsk Anomaly from within.
UNPSC Explorers are selected from among Altered Humans due to their ability to enter and exit the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The Explorers are stationed at UNPSC Explorer Facilities, which are located withing the PSZ Inner Perimeter at the edge of the Pechorsk Anomaly.
<L1>UNPSC Explorer's main objectives are gathering Altered Items and special Artifacts inside the Pechorsk Anomaly as well as carrying out Top Priority and regular Missions across the Pechorsk Anomaly Segments.</L1>

text:
UNPSC Explorers Facilities are fortified standalone multifunctional complexes for housing UNPSC Explorers, equipped with everything they need for their life and work.
Explorer Facilities were usually set up in old buildings at the edge of the Pechorsk Anomaly, near the exit points used by Altered Humans assigned as Explorers.
In 2003, the Standard UNPSC Explorer Facility Project was established. Since then, all Explorer Facilities have been built based on the standard modular structure. Some of the existing Facilities were also rebuilt in accordance with the project.
All Facilities are equipped with the following standard units:
• Security checkpoint with gates
• Command Room
• Training Ground
• <L1>Dormitory</L1>
• <L1>Supply Depot</L1>
• <L1>Shooting Range</L1>
• <L2>Armory</L2>
• <L10>Laboratory</L10>
translation:
UNPSC Explorers Facilities are fortified standalone multifunctional complexes for housing UNPSC Explorers, equipped with everything they need for their life and work.
Explorer Facilities were usually set up in old buildings at the edge of the Pechorsk Anomaly, near the exit points used by Altered Humans assigned as Explorers.
In 2003, the Standard UNPSC Explorer Facility Project was established. Since then, all Explorer Facilities have been built based on the standard modular structure. Some of the existing Facilities were also rebuilt in accordance with the project.
All Facilities are equipped with the following standard units:
• Security checkpoint with gates
• Command Room
• Training Ground
• <L1>Dormitory</L1>
• <L1>Supply Depot</L1>
• <L1>Shooting Range</L1>
• <L2>Armory</L2>
• <L10>Laboratory</L10>

text:
Facility 27 was assembled in 2004-2006 based on the Standard UNPSC Explorers Facility Project approved in 2003 after the UNPSC successfully secured the funding for infrastructural upgrade.
Equipped with gates, Command Room, <L1>Dormitory</L1>, <L1>Supply Depot</L1>, <L2>Armory</L2>, and <L6>Laboratory</L6>.
It is able to house up to 4 Explorers simultaneously.
For your convenience, the Facility Layout is available in the center of the yard.

Equipped with gates, Command Room, <L1>Dormitory</L1>, <L1>Supply Depot</L1>, <L2>Armory</L2>, and <L6>Laboratory</L6>.
It is able to house up to 4 Explorers simultaneously.
For your convenience, the Facility Layout is available in the center of the yard.

text:
This wrist-mounted device for use by Explorers both at the Facility and within the Pechorsk Anomaly.
It displays current time, vital signs (Health, Stamina & Hunger), <L3>armor protection level</L3>, <L4>exposure to Distortion and remaining protection time</L4>, as well as carry load.
It is also used to authenticate Explorers via electronic locks for access to various areas within the Explorer Facility.

It is also used to authenticate Explorers via electronic locks for access to various areas within the Explorer Facility.

text:
A tablet computer built for autonomous use inside the Pechorsk Anomaly.
Includes a map of accessible sectors, active missions info, a Explorer Handbook, a built-in Tidemeter and lighting, and a compass.
Development of this tablet started in 2002 to replace the field bags used by Explorers. It became part of the standard Explorer gear in 2006, following the deployment of a next-generation monitoring system for Pechorsk Anomaly phenomena.
Passing to third parties, unauthorized modifications, and non‑intended use are strictly prohibited!

Passing to third parties, unauthorized modifications, and non‑intended use are strictly prohibited!

text:
Flashlights are an essential part of UNPSC Explorer gear, necessary operations at night, in dark spaces, and for interacting with certain Artifact Nests.
UNPSC flashlights are designed to remain fully functional in the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The UNPSC Pocket Flashlight with a pocket clip can be carried in hand or attached to your chest or any other equipment slot.
<L3>Hands-free UNPSC Head Flashlight can be worn alone or on a Sfera, PASGT or FAST helmet.</L3>
translation:

UNPSC flashlights are designed to remain fully functional in the Pechorsk Anomaly.
The UNPSC Pocket Flashlight with a pocket clip can be carried in hand or attached to your chest or any other equipment slot.
<L3>Hands-free UNPSC Head Flashlight can be worn alone or on a Sfera, PASGT or FAST helmet.</L3>

text:
A device for storing, dispensing, and throwing Probes with one hand to detect and discharge Passive Dangerous Entities.
It is an Explorer tool that makes it safer to navigate in the Pechorsk Anomaly.
It features a simple mechanical design and is loaded with Probes made of a special alloy that resonates with local Anomalies.
In 2007, it replaced the pouches of empty casings that Explorers had relied on for many years.

It is an Explorer tool that makes it safer to navigate in the Pechorsk Anomaly.

In 2007, it replaced the pouches of empty casings that Explorers had relied on for many years.

text:
A handheld semi-automatic device designed to detect and locate Artifacts inside Artifact Nests within the Pechorsk Anomaly.
When an Artifact is nearby, the device emits an audio signal that grows more intense as you approach. A visual indicator simultaneously points toward the Artifact – its brightness increases as your orientation becomes more accurate.
The 2005 detector model is light, compact, and ergonomic, but only features basic functions. It is intended for use with regular Artifact Nests <L3>and is incapable of detecting or revealing invisible Artifact Nests</L3>.

The 2005 detector model is light, compact, and ergonomic, but only features basic functions. It is intended for use with regular Artifact Nests <L3>and is incapable of detecting or revealing invisible Artifact Nests</L3>.

text: Pechorck Anomaly, also known as the Radius, is an unprecedented phenomenon that manifested in 1987 on a site of one of the former Baltic republics in a small town of Pechorsk, completely replacing it with a vast sphere of fog dozens of kilometers in diameter. Everything that ever was there got consumed by the Radius and anything that enters its territory never comes back, except for the Altered.
translation: Pechorck Anomaly, also known as the Radius, is an unprecedented phenomenon that manifested in 1987 on a site of one of the former Baltic republics in a small town of Pechorsk, completely replacing it with a vast sphere of fog dozens of kilometers in diameter. Everything that ever was there got consumed by the Radius and anything that enters its territory never comes back, except for the Altered.

text:
<L1>Pechorsk Anomaly Sectors are detached zones reconstructed within the Pechorsk Anomaly. They are based on the layout of former Pechorsk and its suburbs as of 1987.
These Sectors are amalgamations of the Pechorsk landscape with objects of both human and anomalous nature.</L1>
translation:
<L1>Pechorsk Anomaly Sectors are detached zones reconstructed within the Pechorsk Anomaly. They are based on the layout of former Pechorsk and its suburbs as of 1987.
These Sectors are amalgamations of the Pechorsk landscape with objects of both human and anomalous nature.</L1>

text: A recurring dangerous phenomenon that happens at certain intervals and kills the Altered inside the Pechorsk Anomaly. It also rearranges the objects and brings back all the eliminated hostile entities.
translation: A recurring dangerous phenomenon that happens at certain intervals and kills the Altered inside the Pechorsk Anomaly. It also rearranges the objects and brings back all the eliminated hostile entities.

text: Places inside the Pechorsk Anomaly, inaccessible to the hostile entities and unaffected by the Tide. They can be used for resting and storing gear and supplies.
translation: Places inside the Pechorsk Anomaly, inaccessible to the hostile entities and unaffected by the Tide. They can be used for resting and storing gear and supplies.

text: Extremely hazardous enclosed areas inside the Pechorsk Anomaly. Entering them will result in death withing minutes. Further research needed.
translation: Extremely hazardous enclosed areas inside the Pechorsk Anomaly. Entering them will result in death withing minutes. Further research needed.

text:
The Kalasaare Village is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly. It must have been recreated based on the former fishermen village by the lake close to Pechorsk.
This sector is the closest to the Anomaly's perimeter and Facility 27, and <L1>supposedly the least populated with the hostile entities.</L1>
translation:
The Kalasaare Village is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly. It must have been recreated based on the former fishermen village by the lake close to Pechorsk.
This sector is the closest to the Anomaly's perimeter and Facility 27, and <L1>supposedly the least populated with the hostile entities.</L1>

text: <L2>Romashka Cooperative is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly recreated basing on the cottage settlement, owned by the citizens of Pechorsk and mostly used by them for seasonal recreation.</L2>
translation: <L2>Romashka Cooperative is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly recreated basing on the cottage settlement, owned by the citizens of Pechorsk and mostly used by them for seasonal recreation.</L2>

text: <L3>Pechorsk Outskirts is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly supposedly replicating the outer area of Pechorsk with parts of the town's infrastructure. Housing units densely populated with armed hostile entities.</L3>
translation: <L3>Pechorsk Outskirts is one of the sectors of the Pechorsk Anomaly supposedly replicating the outer area of Pechorsk with parts of the town's infrastructure. Housing units densely populated with armed hostile entities.</L3>

text:
Anomalies are passive dangerous entities - derivatives of the Pechorsk Anomaly: concentrated clusters of energy, often infused with fragments of natural matter, that react aggressively to any external intrusion. They blend into the environment, can become invisible and shift through space.
Anomalies activate at set intervals or upon direct contact. The latter can be exploited to avoid direct encounters – trigger the anomaly by throwing a probe.
Below are listed the anomalies found to this day:
Lightning Anomaly - invisible field with electric sparkles. Randomly moves around and causes damage by electric shock.
Reflector Anomaly - has a pulsing spheric core that sends short shockwaves causing damage upon contact.
Hedgehog Anomaly - expands and contracts sending its sharp spikes in all directions.
Dandelion Anomaly - flower-like anomaly that explodes glass shards once you step on it.
Spark Field Anomay - sparkling electric field with a trigger core in the middle. Upon contact the core sends electric shock through the entire anomaly.
Parasites Anomaly - small pebble-like anomaly attaching itself to the target and exploding if not removed.
Electrostatic Anomaly - invisible field that makes you accumulate scatic electricity as you move resulting in a massive electric discharge.
Blackout Anomaly - puts out the light from all light sources inside it.
translation:
Anomalies are passive dangerous entities - derivatives of the Pechorsk Anomaly: concentrated clusters of energy, often infused with fragments of natural matter, that react aggressively to any external intrusion. They blend into the environment, can become invisible and shift through space.
Anomalies activate at set intervals or upon direct contact. The latter can be exploited to avoid direct encounters – trigger the anomaly by throwing a probe.
Below are listed the anomalies found to this day:
Lightning Anomaly - invisible field with electric sparkles. Randomly moves around and causes damage by electric shock.
Reflector Anomaly - has a pulsing spheric core that sends short shockwaves causing damage upon contact.

Dandelion Anomaly - flower-like anomaly that explodes glass shards once you step on it.
Spark Field Anomay - sparkling electric field with a trigger core in the middle. Upon contact the core sends electric shock through the entire anomaly.
Parasites Anomaly - small pebble-like anomaly attaching itself to the target and exploding if not removed.
Electrostatic Anomaly - invisible field that makes you accumulate scatic electricity as you move resulting in a massive electric discharge.
Blackout Anomaly - puts out the light from all light sources inside it.

text:
Enemies or active danger entities are direct manifestations of the Pechorsk Anomaly, believed to possess a semblance of sentience. They are universally hostile and will attack any outsider on sight. Capable of organizing into groups, often armed. Their forms vary widely, from humanoid to abstract shapes.
Notably, some entities attempt to mimic human speech. All are non-contactable and extremely lethal.
Below are listed the anomalies found to this day:
Mimics - hostile entities that got their name due to their ability to copy human looks and speech. These heavily armed humanoid enemies are capable of organizing into groups for tactical confrontation. Mimics ammunition and armor may vary.
Creeps are small yet very agile creatures moving in zigzag patterns and attacking at high speed.
Fragments are hostile humanoid creatures that might contain a persistent core that lets them quickly regenerate if you don't destroy it. Some have explosive core that also deals damage.
Phantom - invisible humanoid enemy using short-range attacks. Leaves trails on the ground before attacking.
The Cube - invincible and all-seeing enemy traveling through the sky of the Pechorsk Anomaly and attacking from afar.
